input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI app needs to detect when the user toggles dark mode in their
device settings and respond in real time — both updating the UI and logging
the change. How do I detect the current system theme and subscribe to
theme change events? Also, how do I let the user force a specific theme
regardless of system setting?
